channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The hidden cost of AI: Why towns are negotiating with Amazon and Microsoft
item.description: Hobart's $25 million tax levy secured $200 million from Amazon after data centers were blocked for three months.

item.title: Current oil price as of July 23, 2026
item.description: Changes in oil prices affect energy costs and the price of everyday items.

item.title: Trump faces Iran Catch-22 due to midterms, says former commerce secretary
item.description: The war is technically over, but the challenge is winning the peace, according to Trump's former commerce secretary.

item.title: CEOs acknowledge an affordability crisis, but solutions remain complex
item.description: Plus: All the latest news and watercooler discussions from Fortune.
